agents.result_excerpt:
## Summary

Delivered WK52 **R11** fixes for misaligned/overlapping **BuildingPanel**, gutter **x-offset**, and **wheel → zoom while menus are hovered** (pygame HUD path Ursina shares via `InputHandler`).

### What changed
- **`game/ui/building_panel.py`** — `render(..., *, left_rect=...)` clamps **x / y / width / viewport height** to the HUD **left column** (`_fallback_left_rect` when no HUD pass-through). Drops the old full-height/floating viewport and the hardcoded **`panel_x = 10`** layout.
- **`game/engine_facades/render_coordinator.py`** — forwards **`hud._last_left_rect`** into **`BuildingPanel.render`** (minimal **Agent 03** touch; noted in Agent 08 log).
- **`game/ui/hud.py`** — skips **`HeroPanel`** when **`game_state["selected_building"]`** is set (**mutual-exclusive** column). **`handle_menu_scroll`** checks **building panel first**, returns **`True`** on an in-rect wheel even when **`_menu_max_scroll == 0`**, then same “consume chrome” behavior for **hero** left sheet.
- **`tools/screenshot_scenarios.py`** — new **`wk52_building_menu.png`** in **`wk52_pin_alerts`** (pinned + warrior guild selection).
- **`tests/test_wk52_r10_menu_scroll.py`** — **`test_hud_handle_menu_scroll_building_panel_consume_without_content_scroll`**.

### Verification (actual runs; exit codes)
| Command | Exit |
|---------|-----|
| `python3 tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` | **0** |
| `python3 -m pytest tests/ -v` | **0** (**262 passed**) |
| `python3 tools/capture_screenshots.py --scenario wk52_pin_alerts --seed 3 --out docs/screenshots/wk52_phase3/iter_1 --size 1920x1080 --ticks 480` | **0** |
| `python3 tools/capture_screenshots.py — … —out docs/screenshots/wk52_phase3` | **0** |

### Screenshots / iteration
- **`docs/screenshots/wk52_phase3/iter_1`** — iterate-loop capture; **iteration 1 verdict PASS** (`wk52_building_menu`: column-aligned Warriors Guild panel, pinned watch/minimap unaffected).
- Canonical **`docs/screenshots/wk52_phase3`** updated (same 6-shot set including **`wk52_building_menu.png`**).

### Agent log & git
- **Log path:** `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_08_UX_UI_Director.json`  
  **Round:** `sprints["wk52_attachment_phase3_radar_alerts_memorial"].rounds["wk52_r11_building_menu_alignment_scroll"]`  
  (includes **`iteration_log`**, **`screenshot_verdict`**, **`follow_ups`**, JSON validated.)

- **Branches / commits:** work on **`cursor/wk52-r11-building-menu-align-scroll-79b6`** (**`a825215`**, **`5c6e66d`**); orchestrator **`complete`** added **`f5c2e6f`** (receipt inbox). **`git push`** to origin for that branch completed.

PR creation failed (**“no differences vs `main`**”**)** — orchestrator **`--auto-push`** reported **`main`**; remotely your **`main`** may already include equivalent commits. Retry a PR locally if **`main`** and the feature branch diverge on your checkout.

### Human follow-up (Ursina)
```powershell
python main.py
```
Open a guild/building sheet, hover inside it, and scroll — **map zoom should stay off** until the pointer leaves that panel (**`recommended_next_actions`** in the agent log echoes this).

**Orchestrator:** `npm --prefix tools/ai_studio_orchestrator install --silent` and the required **`tsx … complete`** command were **run successfully** (receipt **`0d0adb2a-1425-41b5-a41c-03a05ea68aef`**).
